log: === ROUND 1 ===
--- Gem Dragonborn — Dragon Fear Caster's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 17 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Lich: IMMUNE to charmed! No effect.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
Gem Dragonborn — Dragon Fear Caster activates Gem Flight! (2 uses remaining)
--- Lich's turn ---
=== ROUND 2 ===
--- Gem Dragonborn — Dragon Fear Caster's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 17 WIS save on Lich.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:17+9=26 vs DC 17] SUCCESS. No effect.
--- Lich's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Finger of Death (Level 7 slot, 0 remaining). DC 20 CON save on Gem Dragonborn — Dragon Fear Caster.
→ Gem Dragonborn — Dragon Fear Caster: CON save [d20:16+3=19 vs DC 20] FAIL! 35 necrotic damage. HP: 24/59
=== ROUND 3 ===
--- Gem Dragonborn — Dragon Fear Caster's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 1 remaining). DC 17 WIS save on Lich.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:9+9=18 vs DC 17] SUCCESS. No effect.
--- Lich's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Fire Bolt (Level 0 slot). ranged_spell attack vs Gem Dragonborn — Dragon Fear Caster.
→ ranged_spell attack: [d20:8+12=20 vs AC 13] HIT! 12 fire damage. Gem Dragonborn — Dragon Fear Caster HP: 12/59
=== ROUND 4 ===
--- Gem Dragonborn — Dragon Fear Caster's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Gem Dragonborn — Dragon Fear Caster is affected by Greater Invisibility.
Gem Dragonborn — Dragon Fear Caster activates Gem Flight! (1 uses remaining)
--- Lich's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Fire Bolt (Level 0 slot). ranged_spell attack vs Gem Dragonborn — Dragon Fear Caster.
→ ranged_spell attack: [d20:3+12=15 vs AC 13] HIT! 12 fire damage. Gem Dragonborn — Dragon Fear Caster HP: 0/59
→ Concentration save: [d20:19+3=22 vs DC 10] MAINTAINED!
=== ENCOUNTER ENDED — Winner: ENEMY after 4 rounds ===
